title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Analyst Expectations 2024. Based on aggregated analyst data: Analyst Ratings & Price Targets: The 18 analysts that cover SolarEdge Technologies stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of 30.97, which forecasts a -35.03% decrease in the stock price over the next year. The lowest target is 6.90 and the highest is 49. Other analyst aggregators show similar consensus views, with 21 analysts projecting an average 12-month price target of 39.76 USD, with a high estimate of 100 USD and a low estimate of 24 USD. Current Analyst Distribution: In the current month, SEDG has received 1 Buy Ratings, 23 Hold Ratings, and 7 Sell Ratings. Financial Expectations: Wall Street expects a year-over-year decline in earnings on lower revenues when SolarEdge Technologies reports results for the quarter ended September 2024. Longer-term Outlook: SolarEdge Technologies is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 81.9% and 11% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 82.2% per annum.
